ddls:
CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator */,
  "indicator_code" TEXT /* Code or reference for the indicator */,
  "indicator_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the indicator */,
  "indicator_category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., emissions, water usage, waste management) */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the indicator (e.g., GRI, IPCC) */,
  "indicator_status" TEXT /* Status of the indicator (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., yearly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_topics" (
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material topic */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated indicator */,
  "material_topic_code" TEXT /* Code or reference for the material topic */,
  "material_topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the material topic */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the material topic */,
  "material_aspect" TEXT /* Material aspects identified and coverage */,
  "material_topic_status" TEXT /* Status of the material topic (e.g., active, under review) */,
  "material_topic_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of reporting (e.g., yearly, quarterly) */,
  "material_topic_responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the material topic */,
  "material_topic_responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for the material topic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_material_topics_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ghg_emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission record */,
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated material topic */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the emissions (1, 2, 3) */,
  "ghg_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4, N2O) */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of the emissions */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., tCO2e, t CO2, t CH4, t N2O) */,
  "emission_factor_source" TEXT /* Source of the emission factor (e.g., IPCC, DEFRA, IEA) */,
  "emission_factor_value" TEXT /* Value of the emission factor */,
  "emission_location" TEXT /* Location of the emission source (e.g., plant name, city) */,
  "emission_date" TEXT /* Date of the emission measurement */,
  "emission_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the emission */,
  "emission_certification" TEXT /* Certification or verification of the emission data (e.g., ISO 14064) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ghg_emissions_material_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_topic_id") REFERENCES material_topics ("material_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chapters_sections" (
  "chapter_section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chapter/section */,
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated material topic */,
  "chapter_section_name" TEXT /* Name of the chapter/section */,
  "chapter_section_content" TEXT /* Content of the chapter/section */,
  "chapter_section_status" TEXT /* Status of the chapter/section (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "chapter_section_author" TEXT /* Author of the chapter/section */,
  "chapter_section_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the chapter/section was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chapter_section_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_chapters_sections_material_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_topic_id") REFERENCES material_topics ("material_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_tables" (
  "compliance_table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance table */,
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated material topic */,
  "compliance_table_name" TEXT /* Name of the compliance table */,
  "compliance_table_content" TEXT /* Content of the compliance table */,
  "compliance_table_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance table (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "compliance_table_author" TEXT /* Author of the compliance table */,
  "compliance_table_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the compliance table was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_tables_material_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_topic_id") REFERENCES material_topics ("material_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sustainable_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sustainable goal */,
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated material topic */,
  "goal_name" TEXT /* Name of the sustainable goal */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the contribution to the goal */,
  "goal_status" TEXT /* Status of the goal (e.g., in progress, achieved) */,
  "goal_target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "goal_responsible_department" TEXT /* Department responsible for the goal */,
  "goal_responsible_person" TEXT /* Person responsible for the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sustainable_goals_material_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_topic_id") REFERENCES material_topics ("material_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "impact_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact metric */,
  "material_topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated material topic */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the impact metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the impact metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact metric */,
  "metric_status" TEXT /* Status of the metric (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., environmental, social) */,
  "metric_baseline_value" REAL /* Baseline value for the metric */,
  "metric_target_value" REAL /* Target value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_impact_metrics_material_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_topic_id") REFERENCES material_topics ("material_topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_breakdowns" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission breakdown */,
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated emission record */,
  "breakdown_type" TEXT /* Type of the breakdown (e.g., CO2, CH4, N2O) */,
  "breakdown_value" REAL /* Value of the breakdown */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "breakdown_description" TEXT /* Description of the breakdown */,
  "breakdown_status" TEXT /* Status of the breakdown (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "breakdown_date" TEXT /* Date of the breakdown measurement */,
  "breakdown_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the breakdown */,
  "breakdown_certification" TEXT /* Certification or verification of the breakdown data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emission_breakdowns_emission_id FOREIGN KEY ("emission_id") REFERENCES ghg_emissions ("emission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emission_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission factor */,
  "ghg_type" TEXT /* Type of greenhouse gas (e.g., CO2, CH4, N2O) */,
  "factor_source" TEXT /* Source of the emission factor (e.g., IPCC, DEFRA, IEA) */,
  "factor_value" REAL /* Value of the emission factor */,
  "factor_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "factor_description" TEXT /* Description of the emission factor */,
  "factor_status" TEXT /* Status of the emission factor (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "factor_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the emission factor was updated */,
  "factor_reference" TEXT /* Reference document for the emission factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., environmental manager, data analyst, auditor) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., manager, analyst) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the accessed resource (e.g., indicator, material topic, emission record) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being modified */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the resource */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the resource */,
  "audit_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the audit action occurred */,
  "audit_device" TEXT /* Device used for the audit action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "audit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the audit action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated indicator */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the historical data (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data */,
  "data_certification" TEXT /* Certification or verification of the historical data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource (e.g., report, dataset) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, finalized) */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  "version_last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the version was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)
